description: Three teams answer 'what was revenue last week?' differently, over the fiction-retail warehouse (schema: metric). Rigged conflicts: order-status filtering (are canceled/returned/disputed orders revenue?), source population (orders header vs order_items lines), and the measure itself (stored total vs recomputed from line items). All three EXECUTE against the demo warehouse, so divergence can be proven numerically.

definitions.name: exec_dashboard_weekly_revenue
definitions.source: dashboard query: Executive KPIs / Revenue tile

definitions.name: sales_ops_weekly_revenue
definitions.source: dashboard query: Sales Ops / Weekly Bookings
